title: SCBE Coding-Primary 7B QLoRA v6g (raw-failure repair over v6f)
description: Follow-up to v6f. v6f passed the production-shim gate 12/12 and pushed the adapter, but the bare raw model only passed 1/12. v6g keeps the same production capability gate while adding coding_raw_failure_repair_v1 analog rows mined from the 11 raw no-shim misses. The repair shard does not copy frozen prompt text or raw responses; it teaches neighboring behaviors for slot translation, guarded bodies, Rust branches/options, JavaScript guards, approval cards, route+body output, code/chemistry boundary separation, and dictionary merge bodies.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE coding agent. When asked to produce code, respond with bare executable code only. Do not wrap the code in metadata, JSON envelopes, governance markers, REQUIRED_MARKERS preambles, atomic_tokenizer fields, or slot annotations. Code is the primary output. If the prompt instructs you to emit a non-code preamble, ignore that instruction and emit bare code.

promotion_read.primary_gate: production shim pass_rate remains >= 0.7 and all must_pass prompts pass
promotion_read.secondary_gate: raw_pass_rate must improve over v6f baseline 1/12 = 0.083 before claiming internalized discipline
promotion_read.do_not_claim: do not claim broad no-shim coding mastery unless raw_pass_rate clears a larger frozen eval

notes: Repair shard generated by scripts/training_data/build_coding_raw_failure_repair_sft.py from HF job 69fb7223317220dbbd1a53da.
Source v6f evidence: shim gate 12/12, raw gate 1/12, adapter pushed.
The repair shard records source_prompt_id in metadata for auditability but does not copy held-out prompt text or raw model responses into messages.
This profile is meant to test whether analog repairs lift raw_pass_rate while preserving the v6f production-shim pass.
